---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea for a new feature
title: "[Feature Request]"
labels: ["feature request"]
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature requested.

## Motivation
Why should this feature be implemented? What problems does it solve?

## How it works
Describe how the feature should work or what it should do.

## Additional context
Any additional information such as screenshots, links, or relevant resources.
